assertions.description: Source has D2 (B5819W Schottky), Powerpins1 (Conn_01x02 terminal block), U1 (TLV1117-50 5V LDO), 5VOUTPINS1 (Conn_01x02 5V output), C7/C1/C8/C5 (10uF/16V caps), Q1 (DMP2045U P-MOSFET), Q2 (DMG2305UX N-MOSFET) = 10 components. Output reports total_components=10, diode=1, connector=2, ic=1, capacitor=4, transistor=2. LDO U1 detected with topology=LDO, input_rail=MOTOR_PWR, output_rail=REGULATED_MOTORPWR, estimated_vout=5.0V. Both MOSFETs detected in transistor_circuits. Schottky diode D2 is present in components.

The signal_analysis.decoupling_analysis list is empty, yet C7, C1, C8, and C5 (all 10uF/16V, Capacitor_SMD:CP_Elec_5x5.7) exist in the schematic and are connected to the power rails. The regulator observation notes missing input/output caps for U1 (TLV1117-50), which contradicts the capacitors being present. The decoupling analyzer likely fails because the capacitors are on unnamed nets (MOTOR_PWR, REGULATED_MOTORPWR) that don't match standard +xV power rail naming patterns.
